title: androsaemum hircinum
intro: Androsaemum hircinum, also known as the False Goat's Beard, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the evening primrose family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are believed to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. The health benefits of Androsaemum hircinum include its potential to treat various conditions such as rheumatism, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, and its roots can be dried and used in herbal remedies.
